2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds two new flags to the change_protection() function: MM_CP_UFFD_RWP and MM_CP_UFFD_RWP_RESOLVE, which are used for userfaultfd (UFFD) read-write protection. The MM_CP_UFFD_RWP flag installs a PAGE_NONE PTE with the uffd bit set, while the MM_CP_UFFD_RWP_RESOLVE flag restores the original vma->vm_page_prot and clears the uffd bit. These flags are used to ensure that UFFD RWP is handled consistently across different memory types, including anonymous, shared memory, transparent huge pages, and hugetlb. The patch also updates several functions in the mm module to use these new flags.
